seed_instruction: Write a email to your professor to ask for an extention on a project due in two days.
org_constraint: Ensure the email avoids technical jargon and is easy to understand.
new_constraint: The email must include at least one technical term related to the project.
instruction: Write a email to your professor to ask for an extention on a project due in two days. Ensure the email avoids technical jargon and is easy to understand. The email must include at least one technical term related to the project.
response:
Subject: Request for Extension - [Your Course Name] Project - [Your Name]

Dear Professor [Professor's Last Name],

I hope this email finds you well.

I am writing to respectfully ask if it would be possible to get a short extension on the [Project Name] project, which is currently due in two days.

I have been working hard on the project, but I've run into a few unexpected challenges lately that have slowed down my progress. Specifically, I am having a bit more trouble finalizing the data analysis for the **algorithm** component than I had anticipated. I want to make sure I turn in my best work, and I feel like an extra few days would allow me to properly polish everything.

Would it be possible to submit the project by [Propose a specific new date, e.g., Friday evening]? If that date doesn't work, I am happy to discuss another time that is more convenient for you.

Thank you very much for considering my request. I apologize for any inconvenience this may cause.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Student ID Number]<turn|>
final_answer:
Subject: Request for Extension - [Your Course Name] Project - [Your Name]

Dear Professor [Professor's Last Name],

I hope this email finds you well.

I am writing to respectfully ask if it would be possible to get a short extension on the [Project Name] project, which is currently due in two days.

Thank you very much for considering my request. I apologize for any inconvenience this may cause.
